item.title: Why is Solarium Green Energy Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 02-Mar, Solarium Green Energy Ltd’s stock price continued its downward trajectory, closing at ₹152.75, down ₹3.60 or 2.3% from the previous close. This decline reflects a sustained period of underperformance relative to both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Afcons Infrastructure Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 02-Mar, Afcons Infrastructure Ltd’s stock price fell sharply to ₹282.60, down ₹9.40 or 3.22%, continuing a prolonged downward trend driven by weak financial performance, high promoter share pledging, and broader sectoral pressures. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Suraksha Diagnostic Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 02-Mar, Suraksha Diagnostic Ltd’s stock price fell sharply, closing at ₹265.65, down ₹5.80 or 2.14%, continuing a downward trend that has seen the share price hit a new 52-week and all-time low of ₹227.95 during intraday trading. This decline reflects a combination of recent negative financial results, underwhelming market returns, and weakening investor participation. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Bajaj Housing Finance Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 02-Mar, Bajaj Housing Finance Ltd’s stock price fell sharply to ₹85.21, down 2.09% for the day, marking a new 52-week and all-time low of ₹81.4 during intraday trading. This decline reflects a combination of recent underperformance, reduced promoter confidence, and technical weakness despite the company’s strong fundamental growth. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is GP Eco Solutions India Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 02-Mar, GP Eco Solutions India Ltd witnessed a significant decline in its share price, falling by 6.58% to close at ₹331.65. This drop reflects a combination of technical weaknesses and subdued investor interest, despite the stock's relatively strong performance over longer time frames. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Muthoot Microfin Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 02-Mar, Muthoot Microfin Ltd’s stock price fell sharply by 3.47% to close at ₹162.65, continuing a downward trend that has seen the share lose over 16% in the past eight trading sessions amid weak long-term fundamentals and reduced institutional interest. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Jio Financial Services Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 02-Mar, Jio Financial Services Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 2.53% to close at ₹248.90. This drop reflects a combination of disappointing quarterly earnings and valuation pressures despite the company’s strong long-term growth metrics. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is GHCL Textiles Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 02-Mar, GHCL Textiles Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 3.55% to close at ₹73.70. This drop reflects a continuation of a downward trend that has persisted over the past week, driven by a combination of weak market performance, reduced investor participation, and consistent underperformance relative to benchmarks. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Nuvama Wealth Management Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 02-Mar, Nuvama Wealth Management Ltd’s stock price has fallen sharply, reflecting a combination of valuation concerns, recent flat quarterly results, and market dynamics that have weighed on investor sentiment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Upsurge Seeds of Agriculture Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 02-Mar, Upsurge Seeds of Agriculture Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 5.0% to close at ₹109.25. This drop reflects a continuation of the stock’s underperformance relative to broader market indices and sector peers. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is AGS Transact Technologies Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 02-Mar, AGS Transact Technologies Ltd witnessed a sharp decline in its share price, hitting a new 52-week and all-time low of ₹3.36. The stock fell by 4.82% during the trading session, continuing a downward trend that has seen the share price lose 8.45% over the past two days. This sustained fall reflects deep-rooted concerns about the company’s financial health and operational performance. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Campus Activewear Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 02-Mar, Campus Activewear Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 3.53% to close at ₹250.10. This drop reflects a continuation of recent downward momentum, despite the company’s recent positive quarterly results and strong operational metrics. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is DDev Plastiks Industries Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 02-Mar, DDev Plastiks Industries Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling 2.62% to ₹264.00 amid a broader trend of underperformance relative to its sector and benchmark indices. Time: 1 hour ago

item.description: On 02-Mar, EKI Energy Services Ltd witnessed a significant decline in its share price, closing at ₹89.80 with a loss of 5.5%, reflecting ongoing challenges in its financial health and market positioning. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Accuracy Shipping Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 02-Mar, Accuracy Shipping Ltd’s stock price has fallen sharply by 10.5% to ₹4.52, reflecting sustained underperformance against the broader market and mounting concerns over the company’s deteriorating financial health and profitability. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is TCC Concept Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 02-Mar, TCC Concept Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, closing at ₹430.40, down ₹15.9 or 3.56% from the previous session. item.title: Why is Bazel International Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 02-Mar, Bazel International Ltd’s stock price fell sharply to a new 52-week low of ₹21.06, declining by 9.96% and continuing a prolonged downtrend that has seen the share lose over 45% in the past eight trading sessions. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Sirca Paints India Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 02-Mar, Sirca Paints India Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 3.64% to close at ₹441.00. This drop comes amid a broader short-term downtrend despite the company’s robust financial performance and market-beating returns over the past year. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Halder Venture Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 02-Mar, Halder Venture Ltd's stock price has edged higher by 0.55% to ₹256.40, continuing a recent upward trend despite underlying fundamental challenges. This modest rise reflects a complex interplay of strong market returns, relative sector outperformance, and valuation factors amid deteriorating profitability and sales. Time: 1 hour ago
